title: Diddles
html:
Diddles — Rankett's operating partner / sales lead, owns the agency-side relationships and partner-program execution while Yahir owns the technical backend. Real name unknown.

What we know

  • Operating role at Rankett: handles sales relationships (cold outreach, A/B email testing, partnership-program qualification) — see 2026 01 02 diddles call.
  • Pre-Rankett: first mention in the 2024 07 mega notebook: "look into the Diddles/jipp idea" — Diddles + Cam Jipp combined idea Yahir was workshopping.
  • Active at the Jan 7, 2026 Rankett meetup as the lead for the partner pitch.
  • Activity proof (Jan 2026): printed 4000 leads, ran 3-prompt A/B test on cold email, building "leads machine" — operationally heavy lifting.
  • Relationship structure: not visible whether Diddles is co-founder, equity partner, or contractor.

Open questions

  • Real name? Diddles is clearly a nickname/handle.
  • Equity stake? Co-founder (50/50 with Yahir) vs commission contractor vs salaried partner?
  • Who's "jipp" in the original Diddles/jipp 2024 mention — same Cam Jipp?
  • Background: SEO ops? Sales? Where did Diddles come from?

Related summaries

  • 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide
  • 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook — earliest mention
